entities.description: user a2gbifl43u1lkj is a specific user referenced in the example query regarding personality vectors and receptiviti scores
foreign born latinos are a demographic group mentioned in the example query regarding population surveys
latinos interviewed by cellphone are a demographic group mentioned in the example query regarding population surveys
the soft labeled personality embedding matrix is a data structure containing personality vectors and their associated colors
the receptiviti score is a metric used to evaluate personality vectors in the context of the example query
population refers to the count of individuals in a specific demographic group within a survey
the query decomposition expert is the role assigned to the ai to break down complex questions into atomic sub questions
a complex question is the input task that needs to be broken down into simple sub questions
simple atomic sub questions are the output components of the decomposition process  each being a direct information retrieval task
a retrieval sub question is a specific type of sub question that requires looking up a specific fact  number  or value in the document
a synthesis question is a specific type of sub question that requires comparing  calculating  or combining answers from previous retrieval questions
the json object is the required format for the response  containing a single key  sub questions  with a list of objects
the  sub questions  key is the container within the json object that holds the list of decomposed questions
the  question  key within each sub question object holds the string of the actual question
the  type  key within each sub question object specifies whether the question is  retrieval  or  synthesis
the user query is the final input provided in the real data section  which is the word  query  itself
example 1 is a demonstration of correct decomposition with independent lookups provided in the text
example 2 is a demonstration of decomposition with retrieval and synthesis steps provided in the text
a personality vector is a data element within the soft labeled personality embedding matrix
color is an attribute mapped to personality vectors in the soft labeled personality embedding matrix
the survey is the context in which population data for latinos is collected in example 2
the report is the document referenced in example 2 that contains population data

relations.description: user a2gbifl43u1lkj is the subject for whom personality vectors are analyzed within the soft labeled personality embedding matrix
receptiviti scores are calculated for the personality vectors associated with user a2gbifl43u1lkj
the population of foreign born latinos is a specific value sought in the survey example
the population of latinos interviewed by cellphone is a specific value sought in the survey example
the soft labeled personality embedding matrix contains personality vectors that are evaluated using receptiviti scores
